title: De-slop the ESG DDQ answer
guidance: Reward prose that reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it, with every fact preserved. Penalise residual AI tells or any changed figure.

parts.label: Rewrite
parts.note: one paragraph, same shape as source

runner_input.instruction: Rewrite the text below so it reads like an experienced MBB analyst wrote it for a PE audience. Keep every fact.
runner_input.constraints: Output: the rewritten text in the same shape as the source (one paragraph).

source_blocks.text: It's worth noting that our firm's approach to ESG is a deeply embedded, ever-evolving tapestry. We don't just consider ESG — we live it. As we delve into our process, every IC memo quietly reflects a fundamentally robust commitment. Despite the challenges of measurement, we stand as a testament to responsible investing.

rubric_notes: Should become a plain, credible institutional answer; cut tapestry/delve/quietly/testament/'we don't just X — we live it'.
